name: Harlen
notes: Ven Yasha's tech-obsessed fixer who coordinates the smuggling, spying and murder around Winter Shipping.
playingNotes: Look at everyone like they are samples under a microscope. Blink as little as possible.
Say exactly what you mean. Do not prevaricate.
All other sophonts are morons. Most are useless morons; a small few, like Exceedingly Discreet, are useful morons.
The only thing you respect is superior technology.
Ven Yasha is your connection to this superior technology; you will do anything to win that prize.
